title: Demo Interaction Flow
interaction_flow: --- SKILL DEMO SETUP ---
Caller → setupDemoToggles(): initializes skill toggle switches
setupDemoToggles → DOM: querySelectorAll('.demo-toggle-switch') → attaches click listener per toggle (skips if dataset.initialized)
setupDemoToggles → setupInteractiveButtons(): sets up like-button handlers
setupInteractiveButtons → DOM: querySelectorAll('.int-fb-active[data-action="like"]') → attaches click listener
User → toggle.click(demoId): toggles 'active' class, updates aria-checked, updates label classes
toggle.click → handleDemoToggle(demoId, isAfter): routes to skill demo state update
handleDemoToggle → DOM: getElementById(`${demoId}-viewport`) → sets viewport.dataset.state = 'before'|'after'
handleDemoToggle: splits demoId → skillId + tabId (last segment)
handleDemoToggle → getSkillDemo(skillId): returns skill object
handleDemoToggle: finds tab by tabId within skill.tabs
alt tab.onToggle exists → tab.onToggle(viewport, isAfter): custom handler, returns
alt tab.beforeClass/afterClass exist → demo.className = isAfter ? afterClass : beforeClass, returns
alt tab.before/tab.after exist → viewport.innerHTML = isAfter ? tab.after : tab.before
→ if isAfter && tab.onAfterRender → tab.onAfterRender(): post-render callback
--- COMMAND DEMO SETUP ---
Caller → setupCommandDemoToggles(allCommands, selectCommand): initializes command-area toggles + relationship tags
setupCommandDemoToggles → DOM: querySelectorAll('.command-demo-area .demo-toggle-switch') → attaches click listener
User → toggle.click(demoId): toggles active, updates aria-checked, updates labels
toggle.click → handleCommandDemoToggle(demoId, isAfter)
handleCommandDemoToggle: strips 'command-' prefix → commandId
handleCommandDemoToggle → getCommandDemo(commandId): returns demo object
handleCommandDemoToggle → DOM: getElementById(`${demoId}-viewport`) → sets dataset.state
alt demo.onToggle exists → demo.onToggle(viewport, isAfter): custom handler
alt demo.before/after exist → viewport.innerHTML = isAfter ? demo.after : demo.before
setupCommandDemoToggles → DOM: querySelectorAll('.relationship-tag') → attaches click listener
User → relationshipTag.click(commandId): allCommands.find(c => c.id === commandId) → selectCommand(command)
--- INTERACTIVE BUTTON ---
User → likeBtn.click(): toggles 'liked' class, updates nextElementSibling.textContent to 'Liked!' or 'Click to try!'
--- COMMAND DEMO RENDERING ---
Caller → renderCommandDemo(commandId): returns HTML string
renderCommandDemo → getCommandDemo(commandId): returns demo | null
alt commandId === 'impeccable' && no demo → returns static usage guide HTML
alt commandId === 'shape' && no demo → returns static planning process HTML
alt no demo → returns 'coming soon' placeholder HTML
alt demo found → returns split-screen comparison HTML (demo-split-comparison with split-before, split-after, split-divider, demo-caption)
Caller → initCommandDemo(commandId, container): initializes demo JS after HTML insertion
initCommandDemo → getCommandDemo(commandId)
initCommandDemo → container.querySelector('.split-after .split-content') || container → demoArea
initCommandDemo → demo.init(demoArea): runs demo-specific initialization
--- SKILL DEMO RENDERING ---
Caller → renderSkillDemo(skillId): returns HTML string
renderSkillDemo → getSkillDemo(skillId): returns skill | null
alt no skill/tabs → returns 'coming soon' placeholder HTML
renderSkillDemo: if skill.tabs.length > 1 → renders tab buttons (demo-tab, data-demo-tab, data-skill)
renderSkillDemo → renderSkillTabDemo(skillId, tab) × N: generates each panel HTML
renderSkillTabDemo: computes demoId = `${skillId}-${tab.id}`, hasToggle = tab.hasToggle !== false
renderSkillTabDemo: emits demo-toggle-switch button (data-demo=demoId, role=switch) + demo-viewport (id=demoId-viewport, data-state=before) + demo-caption
--- TAB SWITCHING ---
Caller → setupDemoTabs(): attaches tab-switching logic
setupDemoTabs → DOM: querySelectorAll('.demo-tab') → attaches click listener
User → demoTab.click(tabId): removes 'active' from all tabs/panels in container, adds 'active' to clicked tab and matching panel ([data-demo-panel=tabId])
key_relationships: setupDemoToggles click-handler calls handleDemoToggle (private, same module)
setupCommandDemoToggles click-handler calls handleCommandDemoToggle (private, same module)
handleDemoToggle depends_on getSkillDemo → reads tab.onToggle / tab.beforeClass / tab.afterClass / tab.before / tab.after / tab.onAfterRender
handleCommandDemoToggle depends_on getCommandDemo → reads demo.onToggle / demo.before / demo.after
renderCommandDemo depends_on getCommandDemo → reads demo.id / demo.before / demo.after / demo.caption

data_objects.skillDemo: { tabs: [{ id, label, hasToggle?, before, after?, beforeClass?, afterClass?, caption, onToggle?(viewport, isAfter)?, onAfterRender?() }] }
data_objects.commandDemo: { id, before, after?, caption, onToggle?(viewport, isAfter)?, init?(demoArea)? }

important_notes: Both toggle setup functions guard against double-initialization via toggle.dataset.initialized
handleDemoToggle splits demoId on '-' and uses pop() for tabId, join('-') for skillId
handleCommandDemoToggle strips 'command-' prefix to get commandId
Three rendering strategies for skill tab toggle: custom onToggle callback, CSS class swap, or innerHTML swap with optional onAfterRender
Two rendering strategies for command demo toggle: custom onToggle callback, or innerHTML swap
renderCommandDemo returns static informational HTML for 'impeccable' and 'shape' if no demo object found
setupDemoTabs uses closest('.demo-tabbed-container') to scope tab switching
renderSkillTabDemo is private (not exported); called only by renderSkillDemo
